name: My content showed up after I blocked their bot. Now what?

mainEntity.name: My content showed up after I blocked their bot. Now what?

acceptedAnswer.description: Send cease-and-desist demanding removal; if ignored, sue for continued infringement like publishers did.[1][2] Context: Perplexity ignores blocks, scrapes via users.[2] Key factors: Prove post-block use, damages accrue. Use robots.txt + legal notice. NY cases show persistence.[3] Escalate to DMCA takedown if hosted. Act before statute runs.
